perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a female presenter holding two small bowls of sliced okra. (2) She transitions to a kitchen setting where she adds white rice into a large glass bowl, followed by cracking two onsen eggs. (3) She then pours a significant amount of sliced okra into the bowl, creating a sticky, slimy visual texture. (4) She adds soy sauce, vinegar, and sesame oil from various bottles. (5) She uses a blue and white patterned spoon to thoroughly mix the ingredients, highlighting the gooey consistency. (6) The video shifts to her eating large spoonfuls of the mixture with exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment. (7) She takes a pack of Korean seaweed and uses individual sheets to wrap the rice mixture before eating. (8) She takes a sip from a large glass of iced tea and continues eating the remaining okra rice.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo electronic background track begins immediately. A young female voice speaks in an energetic and high-pitched tone, introducing the dish. (2) Sounds of eggshells cracking and the clinking of a metal spoon against glass are audible during the preparation. (3) The background music remains constant as the narrator explains her love for okra and her fear of not finding it in Korea. (4) During the eating phase, rhythmic chewing and occasional slurping sounds (ASMR-style) are emphasized, interspersed with the narrator's enthusiastic exclamations of 'Mmm!' and 'Delicious!'.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '秋葵加爆拌飯 Okra Rice bowl' (Hook/Title). (2) Decorative Text: '99%韓國人不知道秋葵是什麼' (Variety-style hook about Koreans and okra). (3) Functional Text: '加溫泉蛋 (半熟蛋, 生蛋黃都可以)' (Instructions for adding eggs). (4) Decorative Text: '口感很新鮮又濃稠' (Emotional description of the texture). (5) Decorative Text: '秋葵加爆拌飯完成' (Completion notice). (6) Decorative Text: '=沒有臭味的納豆' (Comparison to natto).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Ingredient Preparation -> Mixing -> Mukbang/Tasting -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian female with long brown hair, wearing a white ribbon in her hair and a light pink long-sleeved top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern domestic kitchen and dining area with warm wooden surfaces, blinds on the window, and kitchen cabinets visible in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Ingredients -> Mixing -> Mukbang -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a culinary vlog intended to share a personal okra recipe while entertaining viewers through a mukbang-style presentation. The creator emphasizes the unique texture and taste of okra to encourage others to try it, using her 'addiction' to the vegetable as a central hook.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Visible placement and focus on specific brands of soy sauce, vinegar, and Korean seaweed (Sempio) during the preparation and eating process.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy Mandarin narration combined with fast-paced editing and variety-show style text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes the 'slimy' visual appeal of okra and onsen eggs to attract viewers interested in specific food textures, mimicking the 'natto' experience without the strong smell.
